## Summary

Describe the change in a few sentences.

## Related Issue

Link the issue here if there is one.

## What Changed

- Explain the main change
- Note any UI, copy, or workflow updates
- Mention any follow-up work if needed

## Screenshots

Add before/after screenshots or a short recording for UI changes.

## Checklist

- I ran `npm run lint`
- I ran `npm run build`
- I updated docs when needed
- I tested the affected flow locally
- I followed the project's Code of Conduct
